title: Cache
excerpt: description: Access to the default cache is enabled by default: image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. * [Cache Reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/runtime-apis/cache) * [How the Cache works](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/reference/how-the-cache-works/#cache-api)(note that cache using `fetch` is unsupported)
